stories.title: World Cup live updates: Egypt take early lead in r...
Sources: Lakers trading center Ayton to Wizards
stories.summary: The Lakers are trading center Deandre Ayton to the Wizards for guard Jaden Hardy and a pair of future second-round picks, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Sources: 76ers, with Brown on board, eye LeBron
stories.summary: One day after trading for Jaylen Brown, the 76ers have entered the mix for LeBron James and are attempting to pitch him, sources said.

stories.title: C's pick up Queta's option, add $56M extension
stories.summary: The Celtics have picked up their option on center Neemias Queta for next season and are adding a four-year, $56 million extension, his agent, Bill Duffy of WME Basketball, told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Djokovic ties Federer with 105th Wimbledon win
stories.summary: Novak Djokovic defeated Arthur Rinderknech on Centre Court for his 105th match win at Wimbledon, tying him with Roger Federer on the men's list for most singles match victories.
